summary: Iteration 301 - FULL PLATFORM UAT for Production Go-Ready Validation. Backend: 34/36 tests passed (94%). Frontend: All 14 pages load successfully without JS errors. Public Creation page conversion funnel fully verified with all 12 data-testid elements present. Share→Remix flow working with localStorage storage. Growth Analytics API fully functional. Cashfree payment gateway configured and operational. PRODUCTION GO DECISION: APPROVED with minor infrastructure issues noted.

Endpoint naming convention - main agent should use correct path

issues: R2 storage images blocked by CORS policy - infrastructure config issue, not code bug. Images use SafeImage fallback gracefully.
Cloudflare beacon.min.js blocked by CSP - non-critical analytics script, does not affect functionality
